Interface BaseGUI

All Superinterfaces:
org.bukkit.inventory.InventoryHolder
All Known Implementing Classes:
ConflictSelectionGUI, CustomAnvilGUI, EnchantEditorGUI, EnchantingGUI, EnchantListGUI, EnchantmentGuideGUI, LevelSelectionGUI, ReforgeAbilitySelectorGUI, ReforgeEditorGUI, ReforgeEnchantSelectorGUI, ReforgeGemEditorGUI, ReforgeGUI, ReforgeItemTypeSelectorGUI, ReforgeListGUI, ReforgeStatEditorGUI, ReforgeStatSelectorGUI, ReforgeVIPGUI, StatEditorGUI, TargetSelectorGUI, XPCostEditorGUI
public interface BaseGUI extends org.bukkit.inventory.InventoryHolder
Common interface for all plugin GUIs to ensure consistent event handling.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onClick(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryClickEvent event)
    Called when a player clicks in the inventory.
    default void
    onClose(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryCloseEvent event)
    Called when the inventory is closed.
    default void
    onDrag(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryDragEvent event)
    Called when a player drags items in the inventory.
    void
    open()
    Open the GUI for the player.

    • open

      Open the GUI for the player.
